theme.title: Expanded Past Tenses
theme.description: Practice longer sentences using Spanish past tenses including pretérito perfecto, indefinido, and imperfecto.

lesson.title: Travel Stories
lesson.instructions: Translate the longer travel related sentences into Spanish.

exercises.prompt: During our trip we stayed in a small hotel that overlooked the mountains.
exercises.answer: Durante nuestro viaje nos quedamos en un pequeño hotel que daba a las montañas
exercises.explanation: Indefinido nos quedamos for completed event and imperfect daba.

exercises.prompt: While we were exploring the old city we discovered a quiet café near the cathedral.
exercises.answer: Mientras explorábamos la ciudad vieja descubrimos un café tranquilo cerca de la catedral
exercises.explanation: Imperfect ongoing action and indefinido discovery.

exercises.prompt: I had never seen such beautiful mountains before I traveled to that region.
exercises.answer: Nunca había visto montañas tan hermosas antes de que viajé a esa región

exercises.prompt: Every morning the fishermen returned to the harbor while the sun was rising.
exercises.answer: Cada mañana los pescadores regresaban al puerto mientras salía el sol

exercises.prompt: Last summer we drove across the country and visited many historic towns.
exercises.answer: El verano pasado condujimos por todo el país y visitamos muchos pueblos históricos

exercises.prompt: When the guide finished explaining the history we walked through the ancient ruins.
exercises.answer: Cuando el guía terminó de explicar la historia caminamos por las ruinas antiguas

exercises.prompt: We were looking for the museum for almost an hour before someone helped us.
exercises.answer: Estábamos buscando el museo por casi una hora antes de que alguien nos ayudó
exercises.explanation: Imperfect progressive situation interrupted by a completed action.

exercises.prompt: I have taken many photos during this trip because the landscapes are incredible.
exercises.answer: He tomado muchas fotos durante este viaje porque los paisajes son increíbles

exercises.prompt: When we finally reached the summit we were completely exhausted.
exercises.answer: Cuando finalmente alcanzamos la cima estábamos completamente agotados
exercises.explanation: Indefinido for reaching the summit and imperfect for the state.

exercises.prompt: Before we left the city we bought souvenirs for our friends and family.
exercises.answer: Antes de salir de la ciudad compramos recuerdos para nuestros amigos y familia
